variants: Leander Swann currently resides in Harlequin Park, where he is employed by Driftwing Robotics. He was born in Dovetail Quay and earned his degree from the Quicksilver Music Institute, which fostered his interest in technology and creativity. In his professional life, Leander primarily uses the English language to communicate with colleagues and clients. His role at Driftwing Robotics highlights his commitment to advancing the field of robotics, blending his artistic and technical skills with innovation.
